name: development-workflow
description: Generic development workflow skills for Codex agents: evidence-based handoff, post-merge protocol, PR fix continuation, review gates, deploy checks and dirty worktree safety.

interface.longDescription: Helps Codex agents continue software development from evidence: branch and PR state, post-merge updates, same-PR fixes, monster review tracking, deploy checks, prod-ready checks, dirty worktree handling and redacted handoff output.
defaultPrompt: Use $development-handoff after a merge, PR fix, review, deploy or interrupted agent session.
